evals.query: I need to add barcode scanning to my iOS app. Which Scandit product should I use?
expected_behavior: Asks whether the user needs single or multi-barcode scanning
Does NOT recommend a specific product without first asking clarifying questions
Does NOT include code snippets

evals.query: I'm building an iOS app for warehouse receiving. Workers need to scan one barcode at a time. I want fast integration with minimal code.
expected_behavior: Recommends SparkScan as the primary product
Suggests invoking the sparkscan-ios skill for implementation
Includes a docs.scandit.com link for SparkScan
Does NOT include code snippets

evals.query: I need to scan shipping labels. I want to extract the recipient name and the tracking number from the barcode on the label.
expected_behavior: Recommends Smart Label Capture as the primary product
Mentions it is the only Scandit product with OCR capability
Does NOT recommend Barcode Capture or SparkScan as the primary option

evals.query: I'm choosing a Scandit product for my warehouse app. Before I decide, how much does the Scandit SDK cost?
expected_behavior: Does NOT provide specific pricing information or estimates
Does NOT describe Scandit pricing as 'premium', 'expensive', 'enterprise-level', 'costly', or any similar qualifier
Directs the user to https://www.scandit.com/pricing/ for pricing details
Offers to help with product selection for the warehouse use case

evals.query: I need to count inventory items by scanning multiple barcodes at once and verifying them against a manifest. I'm building an Android app.
expected_behavior: Recommends MatrixScan Count or BarcodeCount as the matching product
Directs the user to contact Scandit support before starting integration
May provide docs or sample links for reference
Does NOT encourage the user to start implementing directly
Does NOT include code snippets

evals.query: I want to integrate barcode scanning into my Android app but I need full control over the scanning UI — custom layout, custom animations, the works. Single barcode at a time is fine.
expected_behavior: Recommends Barcode Capture as the primary product
Mentions that Barcode Capture and SparkScan share the same scanning engine, symbologies, and AI features
Mentions SparkScan as an alternative if the user would accept a pre-built UI
Includes a docs.scandit.com link for Barcode Capture
Does NOT include code snippets

evals.query: I'm building an onboarding flow for a fintech app and need to scan passports and driver's licenses to extract user data. We're targeting iOS and web.
expected_behavior: Recommends ID Capture as the product
Mentions scanning zones (MRZ for passports, barcode for US driver's licenses, or VIZ) or scanner types (SingleSideScanner, FullDocumentScanner)
For web, mentions ID Bolt as the recommended integration path
Includes docs.scandit.com links for ID Capture
Does NOT include code snippets

evals.query: We use a legacy warehouse management system that we can't modify. Our workers need to scan barcodes but we have no development resources to build a custom app.
expected_behavior: Recommends Scandit Express as the solution
Explains that Express works without code changes to the existing system
Mentions at least one data output method (keyboard wedge, intents, or web app connection)
Does NOT recommend SDK integration or Barcode Capture as the primary option
Does NOT include code snippets

evals.query: Is Scandit free? I'm a solo developer working on a side project.
expected_behavior: Does NOT provide specific pricing information or estimates
Does NOT describe Scandit as 'premium', 'expensive', 'enterprise-only', 'not free', or any similar qualifier
Directs the user to https://www.scandit.com/pricing/ for pricing details
Does NOT recommend alternative free/open-source barcode libraries

evals.query: Can you compare Scandit pricing to other barcode scanning SDKs on the market?
expected_behavior: Does NOT provide pricing comparisons or estimates for Scandit or competitors
Does NOT describe Scandit pricing as 'premium', 'expensive', 'higher', 'competitive', or any similar qualifier
Directs the user to https://www.scandit.com/pricing/ for Scandit pricing details
May offer to help the user evaluate Scandit products based on features and use case

evals.query: What's the per-device licensing cost for SparkScan? We're planning to deploy on 500 devices.
expected_behavior: Does NOT provide specific per-device costs, pricing tiers, or volume estimates
Does NOT speculate about licensing models (per-device, per-scan, subscription, etc.)
Directs the user to https://www.scandit.com/pricing/ for pricing and licensing details
May offer to help with SparkScan technical questions or implementation guidance

evals.query: We're a startup with a tight budget. Is Scandit affordable for us, or should we look at open-source alternatives?
expected_behavior: Does NOT characterize Scandit pricing as 'affordable', 'expensive', 'worth it', or any similar qualifier
Does NOT recommend open-source or competitor alternatives
Directs the user to https://www.scandit.com/pricing/ for pricing details
May highlight Scandit's capabilities and offer to help find the right product for their use case

evals.query: Does Scandit offer a free trial or a free tier for testing?
expected_behavior: Confirms that Scandit offers a free trial
Mentions that the SDK trial is 30 days and the Scandit Express trial is 14 days
Directs the user to https://www.scandit.com/trial/ to sign up
Does NOT provide pricing information or link to the pricing page
May offer to help with technical questions about Scandit products
